title: 办理入住
prompt_en: Check in at a hotel. Tell them you have a reservation.
prompt_zh: 在酒店办理入住，告知有预订。

title: 询问设施
prompt_en: Ask about hotel facilities like the gym and pool.
prompt_zh: 询问酒店设施如健身房和游泳池。

title: 房间问题
prompt_en: Complain about a problem in your room to the front desk.
prompt_zh: 向前台投诉房间的问题。

title: 延迟退房
prompt_en: Ask for a late check-out on your departure day.
prompt_zh: 在退房当天要求延迟退房。
